title: Add more Python lessons to the backend

requirements.text: Add at least 8 additional Python lessons to the pre-populated lesson list in the backend actor. New lessons should cover a variety of topics and difficulty levels (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) not already covered by the existing 8 lessons. Each lesson must include a title, description, topic emoji, difficulty, and a relevant Python code example.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 8 new lessons are pre-populated in the backend actor in addition to the existing 8.
New lessons span all three difficulty levels: Beginner, Intermediate, and Advanced.
Each new lesson has a non-empty title, description, topic emoji, and Python code example.
All new lessons are returned by the listLessons query and are accessible by their ID.

nonGoals: Changing the lesson data model or schema.
Modifying the frontend UI or lesson display components.
Adding new lesson categories or tags beyond the existing difficulty system.
